overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Last of Us Part II, featuring a character navigating a rain-soaked abandoned urban environment. The player climbs through narrow ivy-covered passages between brick walls, engages in combat on a rooftop, and traverses the wet concrete surface while exploring the overgrown post-apocalyptic setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between ivy-covered brick walls with rock formations

events.description: character climbs up rock formation to higher ground
moves from rocky terrain into narrow brick corridor with metal fence visible ahead

agents.ego_description: climbing over rocks and moving through a narrow wet passage flanked by ivy-covered brick walls

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders forming a natural staircase
tall red brick wall completely covered in green ivy and vines
matching brick wall with dense vegetation growth
rusted metal gate blocking the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character ascends through a narrow, rain-soaked passage between two tall brick walls completely covered in dense ivy. The ground is wet concrete mixed with rocks, and the area feels enclosed with only partial sky visibility above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop with low brick wall cover and distant city views

events.description: emerges from narrow passage onto open rooftop area
takes cover behind low brick wall and aims weapon at distant enemy

agents.ego_description: crouching behind a low brick wall and aiming a pistol at an enemy standing on the rooftop ahead

notable_agents.action: enemy standing on the rooftop, facing toward the player character

entered.detail: waist-high red brick wall providing cover at the rooftop edge
wet flat concrete rooftop with puddles reflecting the gray sky
ruined city buildings visible through the haze in the background

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open rooftop with full sky visibility, taking cover behind a low brick wall. The wet concrete surface reflects the overcast sky, and an enemy stands visible in the distance near the rooftop edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop with HVAC equipment and abandoned debris

events.description: stands up from cover and begins running across the rooftop
moves around large HVAC unit temporarily blocking view of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: running across the wet rooftop navigating around HVAC units and abandoned equipment while holding a weapon

entered.detail: large rectangular metal HVAC unit with moss growing on top
elevated concrete structure with circular metal covers
makeshift wooden pallet barriers stacked near the edge
tattered blue tarp covering abandoned supplies or equipment

segments.scene_description: The character runs across the open rooftop, navigating around large HVAC units and raised concrete platforms. The area is littered with abandoned debris including wooden pallets and tarp coverings, with the wet concrete reflecting the gray overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop edge overlooking forested valley and ruins

events.description: approaches the edge of the rooftop revealing view of trees and lower area below
view opens up to show dense pine forest and overgrown field below the building

agents.ego_description: walking along the rooftop edge while looking down at the overgrown forest and ruins below

entered.detail: low brick wall along the rooftop edge with metal pipes attached
dense evergreen trees growing in the valley below the building
abandoned brick structures visible through the trees in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the edge of the rooftop, revealing a dramatic view of a forested valley below with dense pine trees and distant ruined buildings. The scene transitions from the built environment to an overlook of nature reclaiming the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, ivy-choked alleyway into a wide, panoramic overlook of a reclaimed city. It begins as the character ascends through a narrow passage between towering brick walls draped in dense greenery, where the view is restricted to a sliver of overcast sky. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens onto a vast, rain-slicked rooftop where the camera tracks the movement past HVAC units and scattered debris under a gray sky. The perspective then shifts across the wet concrete surface toward the building's edge, navigating around wooden pallets and tarp coverings. Finally, the camera reaches the rooftop perimeter, revealing a dramatic transition from the urban ruins to a sweeping view of a forested valley filled with pine trees and distant crumbling architecture.
